mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_comments WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT * FROM activity_comments WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_comments (id, activity_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE activity_comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
UPDATE activity_comments SET is_deleted = true WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_comments WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = false
